name: DriveTime Used Cars
description_short: DriveTime is a used car dealership offering no-haggle pricing and fast in-house financing approvals, with a Chesapeake, VA location and nationwide presence.
description_long:
DriveTime Used Cars is a national used car dealership chain with a location at 1705 S Military Hwy in Chesapeake, Virginia. The company positions itself as a consumer-friendly alternative to traditional car dealerships, emphasizing simplicity, transparency, and speed in the car-buying process. With over 28,000 customer reviews averaging 4.5 out of 5 stars, DriveTime has built a significant retail footprint across the United States.

DriveTime offers a full used car buying experience under one roof: vehicle browsing, test drives, and in-house financing. Shoppers can get a personalized down payment estimate online before stepping foot in the dealership, and the company claims to present complete financing options on any of the 20 cars in its Chesapeake lot within 15 minutes of speaking with staff. The dealership also provides an online trade-in valuation tool, allowing customers to start the trade-in process before their visit. Appointment booking is available online, and staff are referred to as 'customer experience guides' rather than salespeople.

What sets DriveTime apart from conventional dealerships is its no-haggle pricing model: the listed price is the final price, eliminating negotiation. The company claims its required down payments average $1,000 less than the market average for financed vehicle sales nationwide, based on a comparison against a leading auto research company's 2024 data. Hours of operation are Monday through Friday 9 AM–8 PM and Saturday 9 AM–7 PM at the Chesapeake location.

DriveTime is best suited for buyers who want a straightforward, low-pressure used car purchase with bundled financing — particularly those who may not qualify for traditional bank auto loans. However, prospective buyers should note that advertised vehicle prices exclude taxes, finance charges, doc fees up to $599, and other applicable fees, meaning the out-of-pocket cost will be higher than the sticker price. As an in-house financing dealership, interest rates are not disclosed on the website, and buyers with strong credit may find better financing terms through a bank or credit union.
pros: No-haggle pricing — listed price is final, no negotiation required
Financing options on all 20 lot vehicles presented within 15 minutes of arrival
Online down payment estimator available before visiting the dealership
Average required down payment is $1,000 below the national market average (per DriveTime's own data)
Online trade-in valuation tool lets customers start the process remotely
Online appointment booking available; staff positioned as guides, not salespeople
cons: Advertised prices exclude taxes, finance charges, doc fees up to $599, and other fees — total cost higher than listed
Chesapeake location carries only ~20 vehicles — limited inventory compared to larger dealers
Closed Sundays, limiting availability for weekend shoppers
Interest rates and full financing terms not disclosed on the website
Trade-in offer must ultimately be completed in-person at the dealership
best_for: Buyers with limited or damaged credit who need in-house financing to purchase a vehicle
First-time car buyers who want a low-pressure, no-negotiation purchase experience
Consumers who want to complete most of the purchase process online before visiting
Shoppers in the Chesapeake/Hampton Roads area looking for a transparent pricing model
diagnosis: DriveTime is best for used car buyers — especially those with subprime credit — who want a no-pressure, fixed-price dealership with bundled in-house financing. This is a car dealership, not a personal loan lender; it is miscategorized and would more accurately belong in an 'auto loans' or 'auto dealers' category if one were available. Buyers with good credit should compare DriveTime's financing terms against bank or credit union auto loans before committing.
services: Used vehicle sales (2015–2022 model years observed)
In-house auto financing with fast approvals
No-haggle fixed pricing on all vehicles
Customer experience guide consultations (non-commission staff model)
